steps.title: Spot the evidence of outperformance
steps.content: The passage compares the program's performance to the road-map method's, then provides evidence: “it more accurately identified sidewalks, and it even distinguished between cobblestone and brick.” This phrase directly shows the Hosseini program outperformed the road-map method.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Superior” (higher in quality or better) fits because the passage demonstrates the program is better than the road-map method. The other three contradict the evidence of outperformance or describe unrelated relationships. That matches choice A — A is correct.
